normalized_title: Planning Bulletin 115/2024: Short-Term Rental Accommodation (STRA) - Guidance for Local Government
scope_summary: Guides WA local governments on implementing the September 2024 amendments to the Planning and Development (Local Planning Schemes) Regulations 2015 for short-term rental accommodation. It covers incorporating the new 'deemed' land use classes ('hosted' and 'unhosted short-term rental accommodation') and the 'model' 'tourist and visitor accommodation' class into scheme zoning tables (mandatory amendments by 1 January 2026), the state-wide development approval exemption for hosted STRA, the 90-night exemption for unhosted STRA in the Perth metropolitan area, local planning policy preparation, bushfire considerations, and the mandatory state-wide STRA Register operating from 1 January 2025. Updates a previous version of the bulletin released in November 2023.

key_numeric_standards.applies_to: unhosted short-term rental accommodation within the Perth metropolitan area (where the MRS applies), from date of registration
unhosted short-term rental accommodation (local governments may condition lower occupancy via development approval)

cross_references.cited: Planning and Development (Local Planning Schemes) Regulations 2015
Position Statement: Planning for Tourism and Short-Term Rental Accommodation (November 2023)
WALGA STRA Local Planning Policy Guidance

Multi-column PDF interleaving scrambles sentence order in the body text
